Room.title: Game Room
Room.description: Represents an online 共圆 matchmaking and match room containing players, configs, turns, live timers, and move histories.

id.description: The unique ID of the room.

name.description: A customized name for the room.

size.description: Board size, e.g., 9 for a 9x9 board.

byoyomiTime.description: Total overtime byoyomi reservoir in seconds, e.g., 60.

status.description: The current state of the room.

players.description: The UIDs of the players assigned to Black (first player) and White (second player).

playerNames.description: A dictionary mapping user UID strings to their chosen nicknames.

playerReady.description: Ready states for Black and White players.

playerLives.description: Remaining lives for Black and White players.

playerByoyomi.description: Remaining over-time (byoyomi reservoir) in seconds for Black and White players.

turn.description: The color whose turn it is to act.

winner.description: The color that won the match, or null/empty if none.

lastMoveTime.description: Epoch timestamp in milliseconds of the last action (play or start).

activeDeclaration.description: Tracks concyclic declarations in progress, pause times, and claiming player.

moves.description: Complete ordered historical line of plays, declarations, results and retraction markers.

Message.title: Chat Message
Message.description: A text message sent in the room chat lobby, visible to clients.

/rooms/{roomId}.description: Retrieve or update a specific game room.

/rooms/{roomId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Subcollection of chat messages belonging to this room.
